security.csp: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval' 'wasm-unsafe-eval'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; img-src 'self' data: blob:; media-src 'self' blob:; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com; connect-src 'self'; frame-src 'none'; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self'; form-action 'self';
